passage_title: The pirates of the ancient Mediterranean

sentences.sentence: When one mentions pirates, an image springs to most people's minds of a crew of misfits, daredevils and adventurers in command of a tall sailing ship in the Caribbean Sea.
sentences.translation: 当人们提到海盗时，多数人脑海中会立刻浮现出一群格格不入者、亡命之徒和冒险家驾驶着加勒比海上一艘高大帆船的形象。

structure.text: of a crew of misfits, daredevils and adventurers
in command of a tall sailing ship in the Caribbean Sea

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，说明提到 pirates 时产生的联想。
springs to most people's minds 是形象化表达，表示画面突然浮现在脑海中。
of a crew... 修饰 an image，说明这个形象的内容。
in command of 表示这群人掌控着那艘帆船。

expressions.meaning_zh: 突然浮现在某人脑海中

sentences.sentence: Yet from the first to the third millennium BCE, thousands of years before these swashbucklers began spreading fear across the Caribbean, pirates prowled the Mediterranean, raiding merchant ships and threatening vital trade routes.
sentences.translation: 然而，从公元前第一个千年到第三个千年，也就是这些传奇式海盗开始在加勒比海散播恐惧的数千年前，海盗就在地中海游荡，袭击商船并威胁重要贸易路线。

structure.text: Yet from the first to the third millennium BCE
thousands of years before these swashbucklers began spreading fear across the Caribbean
raiding merchant ships and threatening vital trade routes

difficult_points: Yet 表示转折，纠正人们只联想到加勒比海盗的印象。
thousands of years before... 是插入的时间说明，突出地中海海盗更早。
raiding 和 threatening 是现在分词，补充说明 pirates prowled 的具体行为。
vital trade routes 指对经济和补给非常重要的贸易路线。

sentences.sentence: However, despite all efforts and the might of various ancient states, piracy could not be stopped.
sentences.translation: 然而，尽管各古代国家付出了种种努力并拥有强大力量，海盗活动仍无法被制止。

structure.text: despite all efforts and the might of various ancient states

difficult_points: despite 引导让步性介词短语，强调努力和国家力量都没有奏效。
the might of various ancient states 指多个古代国家的军政实力。
could not be stopped 是被动语态，突出海盗活动难以被外力终结。

sentences.sentence: The situation remained unchanged for thousands of years.
sentences.translation: 这种局面数千年来都没有改变。
difficult_points: The situation 回指前一句海盗活动无法被制止的局面。
remained unchanged 表示状态持续不变。
for thousands of years 强调持续时间极长。

sentences.sentence: Only when the pirates directly threatened the interests of ancient Rome did the Roman Republic organise a massive fleet to eliminate piracy.
sentences.translation: 只有当海盗直接威胁到古罗马的利益时，罗马共和国才组织起一支庞大的舰队来消灭海盗活动。

structure.text: Only when the pirates directly threatened the interests of ancient Rome
did the Roman Republic organise a massive fleet

difficult_points: Only when 位于句首引发部分倒装，所以主句使用 did the Roman Republic organise。
directly threatened the interests 表示直接损害或威胁核心利益。
to eliminate piracy 表目的，说明组织舰队的目标。

sentences.sentence: Under the command of the Roman general Pompey, Rome eradicated piracy, transforming the Mediterranean into "Mare Nostrum" (Our Sea).
sentences.translation: 在罗马将军庞培的指挥下，罗马根除了海盗活动，把地中海变成了“Mare Nostrum”（我们的海）。

structure.text: Under the command of the Roman general Pompey
transforming the Mediterranean into "Mare Nostrum" (Our Sea)

difficult_points: Under the command of 表示军事指挥关系，Pompey 是指挥者。
eradicated piracy 比 eliminated 更强调彻底根除。
transforming... 是现在分词结果状语，说明根除海盗后的地中海被罗马控制。
"Mare Nostrum" 后的 (Our Sea) 是对拉丁名称的解释。

sentences.sentence: Although piracy in the Mediterranean is first recorded in ancient Egypt during the reign of Pharaoh Amenhotep III (c. 1390–1353 BCE), it is reasonable to assume it predated this powerful civilisation.
sentences.translation: 虽然地中海海盗活动最早记录于法老阿蒙霍特普三世统治时期的古埃及（约公元前1390—1353年），但可以合理推断，它早于这个强大文明就已存在。

structure.text: Although piracy in the Mediterranean is first recorded in ancient Egypt during the reign of Pharaoh Amenhotep III (c. 1390–1353 BCE)

difficult_points: Although 引导让步从句，区分“最早记录”和“真实起源”。
is first recorded 使用被动语态，表示现存记录中的首次出现。
it is reasonable to assume 是形式主语结构，后面的 it predated... 是推断内容。
predated 表示发生或存在时间早于某对象。

sentences.sentence: This is partly due to the great importance the Mediterranean held at this time, and partly due to its geography.
sentences.translation: 这部分是因为地中海在当时具有重大重要性，也部分是因为它的地理环境。

structure.text: is partly due to the great importance
the Mediterranean held at this time
and partly due to its geography

difficult_points: This 回指前一句“海盗活动可能早于古埃及记录”的推断。
partly due to... and partly due to... 表示两个部分原因。
the Mediterranean held at this time 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 importance。

sentences.sentence: While the Mediterranean region is predominantly fertile, some parts are rugged and hilly, even mountainous.
sentences.translation: 虽然地中海地区总体上较为肥沃，但有些地方崎岖多丘，甚至多山。

structure.text: While the Mediterranean region is predominantly fertile
are rugged and hilly, even mountainous

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，表示总体肥沃与局部崎岖之间的对比。
predominantly fertile 表示大部分区域肥沃，而不是全部区域。
rugged and hilly, even mountainous 是递进描述，强调地形越来越不利于农业。

sentences.sentence: In ancient times, the inhabitants of these areas relied heavily on marine resources, including fish and salt.
sentences.translation: 在古代，这些地区的居民严重依赖海洋资源，包括鱼和盐。
difficult_points: the inhabitants of these areas 指前一句地形崎岖地区的居民。
relied heavily on 表示高度依赖，是这些地区转向海上活动的背景。
including fish and salt 举例说明 marine resources 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Most had their own boats, possessed good seafaring skills, and unsurpassed knowledge of the local coastline and sailing routes.
sentences.translation: 大多数人拥有自己的船，具备良好的航海技能，并对当地海岸线和航线有无与伦比的了解。

structure.text: and unsurpassed knowledge of the local coastline and sailing routes

difficult_points: Most 指这些沿海地区的大多数居民。
had、possessed 和省略的 possessed 共同列举他们具备的海上条件。
unsurpassed knowledge 表示知识无人能比，强调他们熟悉当地海域。

sentences.sentence: Thus, it is not surprising that during hardships, these men turned to piracy.
sentences.translation: 因此，在艰难时期，这些人转向海盗活动并不令人意外。

structure.text: that during hardships, these men turned to piracy

difficult_points: Thus 表示前面地理和技能条件带来的结论。
it is not surprising that... 是形式主语结构，that 从句是真正内容。
turned to piracy 表示在困境中转而以海盗活动谋生。

sentences.sentence: Geography itself further benefited the pirates, with the numerous coves along the coast providing places for them to hide their boats and strike undetected.
sentences.translation: 地理本身进一步有利于海盗，因为海岸沿线众多小海湾为他们提供了藏船和在不被发现的情况下发动袭击的地方。

structure.text: with the numerous coves along the coast providing places
for them to hide their boats and strike undetected

difficult_points: Geography itself 强调地理条件本身就是海盗优势来源。
with + 名词 + 分词 构成独立结构，说明小海湾如何帮助海盗。
for them to hide... and strike... 表示 places 的用途。
undetected 修饰 strike，说明袭击时不被发现。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在不被发现的情况下袭击

sentences.sentence: Before the invention of ocean-going caravels* in the 15th century, ships could not easily cross long distances over open water.
sentences.translation: 在15世纪远洋卡拉维尔帆船发明之前，船只无法轻易横跨开阔水域中的长距离。

structure.text: Before the invention of ocean-going caravels* in the 15th century
could not easily cross long distances over open water

difficult_points: Before 引出技术出现前的限制背景。
ocean-going caravels* 指适合远洋航行的卡拉维尔帆船，星号是原文脚注标记。
could not easily cross 强调古代船只远离海岸航行的困难。

sentences.sentence: Thus, in the ancient world most were restricted to a few well-known navigable routes that followed the coastline.
sentences.translation: 因此，在古代世界，大多数船只都受限于少数几条沿海岸延伸、广为人知且可通航的路线。

structure.text: were restricted to a few well-known navigable routes

difficult_points: most 省略了 ships，指大多数船只。
were restricted to 是被动语态，表示航行选择受限制。
that followed the coastline 修饰 routes，解释这些航线为何容易被海盗掌握。

sentences.sentence: Caught in a trap, a slow merchant ship laden with goods had no other option but to surrender.
sentences.translation: 一艘装满货物、速度缓慢的商船一旦落入陷阱，就别无选择，只能投降。

structure.text: a slow merchant ship laden with goods
had no other option but to surrender

difficult_points: Caught in a trap 是过去分词短语，逻辑主语是 a slow merchant ship。
laden with goods 后置修饰 merchant ship，说明商船载货沉重。
had no other option but to... 是固定结构，表示别无选择只能做某事。

expressions.text: have no other option but to

sentences.sentence: In addition, knowledge of the local area helped the pirates to avoid retaliation once a state fleet arrived.
sentences.translation: 此外，对当地地区的了解也帮助海盗在国家舰队抵达后避免报复。

structure.text: helped the pirates to avoid retaliation

difficult_points: In addition 继续补充地理知识给海盗带来的优势。
helped the pirates to avoid 是 help + 宾语 + 不定式结构。
once 引导时间状语从句，表示国家舰队一到达，海盗就能躲避报复。

sentences.sentence: One should also add that it was not unknown in the first and second millennia BCE for governments to resort to pirates' services, especially during wartime, employing their skills and numbers against their opponents.
sentences.translation: 还应补充一点：在公元前第一和第二个千年，政府借助海盗服务并非罕见，尤其是在战时，它们会利用海盗的技能和人数来对抗敌人。

structure.text: that it was not unknown in the first and second millennia BCE for governments to resort to pirates' services
employing their skills and numbers against their opponents

difficult_points: One should also add 是较正式的论述引入语，表示作者补充一个因素。
it was not unknown for governments to... 是形式主语结构，意思是这种情况并非没有发生。
resort to pirates' services 表示政府在需要时求助于海盗。
employing... 是现在分词短语，说明政府如何利用海盗。

sentences.sentence: A pirate fleet would serve in the first wave of attack, preparing the way for the navy.
sentences.translation: 海盗舰队会充当第一波攻击力量，为正规海军铺路。

structure.text: would serve in the first wave of attack
preparing the way for the navy

difficult_points: would serve 表示过去常见做法或功能。
the first wave of attack 指战斗中的第一轮进攻。
preparing the way for... 是现在分词结果或伴随状语，说明海盗舰队为海军创造条件。

sentences.sentence: Some of the regions were known for providing safe harbours to pirates, who, in return, boosted the local economy.
sentences.translation: 有些地区因向海盗提供安全港而闻名，而海盗作为回报推动了当地经济。

structure.text: were known for providing safe harbours to pirates
who, in return, boosted the local economy

difficult_points: were known for 后接动名词 providing，表示因某事而出名。
who 引导非限制性定语从句，指代 pirates。
in return 表示海盗对这些地区提供安全港的回报。

sentences.sentence: The first known record of a named group of Mediterranean pirates, made during the rule of ancient Egyptian Pharaoh Akhenaten (c. 1353–1336 BCE), was in the Amarna Letters.
sentences.translation: 关于一支有名称的地中海海盗团体的第一条已知记录，产生于古埃及法老阿肯那顿统治时期（约公元前1353—1336年），见于《阿马尔纳书信》。

structure.text: The first known record of a named group of Mediterranean pirates
made during the rule of ancient Egyptian Pharaoh Akhenaten (c. 1353–1336 BCE)

difficult_points: 主语很长，核心是 record，后面 of... 说明记录内容。
made during... 是过去分词短语，说明记录形成的时期。
was in the Amarna Letters 表示这条记录出现在《阿马尔纳书信》中。

sentences.sentence: These were extracts of diplomatic correspondence between the pharaoh and his allies, and covered many pressing issues, including piracy.
sentences.translation: 这些是法老与其盟友之间外交通信的摘录，涉及许多紧迫问题，其中包括海盗活动。

structure.text: were extracts of diplomatic correspondence between the pharaoh and his allies

difficult_points: These 指前一句的 the Amarna Letters。
diplomatic correspondence between... 表示外交往来信件。
covered many pressing issues 中 covered 表示“涉及”。
including piracy 举例说明 pressing issues 的一项。

sentences.sentence: It seems the pharaoh was troubled by two distinct pirate groups, the Lukka and the Sherden.
sentences.translation: 看来这位法老受到两个不同海盗群体的困扰，即卢卡人和舍尔登人。

structure.text: the pharaoh was troubled by two distinct pirate groups

difficult_points: It seems 后省略 that，引出根据书信内容得出的推断。
was troubled by 是被动表达，说明法老受到海盗问题困扰。
the Lukka and the Sherden 是 two distinct pirate groups 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: Despite the Egyptian fleet's best efforts, the pirates continued to cause substantial disruption to regional commerce.
sentences.translation: 尽管埃及舰队尽了最大努力，海盗仍继续对区域贸易造成严重扰乱。

structure.text: Despite the Egyptian fleet's best efforts
continued to cause substantial disruption to regional commerce

difficult_points: Despite 引导让步短语，突出埃及舰队努力无效。
continued to cause 表示海盗活动仍在持续。
substantial disruption to regional commerce 指对地区贸易造成重大干扰。

sentences.sentence: In the letters, the king of Alashiya (modern Cyprus) rejected Akhenaten's claims of a connection with the Lukka (based in modern-day Turkey).
sentences.translation: 在这些书信中，阿拉希亚国王（今塞浦路斯）否认了阿肯那顿关于其与卢卡人（位于今土耳其）有关联的说法。

structure.text: rejected Akhenaten's claims of a connection with the Lukka (based in modern-day Turkey)

difficult_points: In the letters 指在《阿马尔纳书信》中。
modern Cyprus 和 based in modern-day Turkey 是现代地理对应说明。
claims of a connection with... 表示阿肯那顿声称阿拉希亚与卢卡人有关。
rejected 表示国王否认这些说法。

sentences.sentence: The king assured Akhenaten he was prepared to punish any of his subjects involved in piracy.
sentences.translation: 这位国王向阿肯那顿保证，他准备惩罚任何参与海盗活动的臣民。

structure.text: he was prepared to punish any of his subjects involved in piracy

difficult_points: assured Akhenaten 后省略 that，引出保证的内容。
he 指 the king，而 his subjects 也是该国王的臣民。
involved in piracy 是过去分词短语，修饰 subjects。
was prepared to punish 表示愿意或准备采取惩罚行动。

sentences.sentence: The ancient Greek world's experience of piracy was different from that of Egyptian rulers.
sentences.translation: 古希腊世界对海盗活动的经历与埃及统治者不同。

structure.text: The ancient Greek world's experience of piracy
was different from that of Egyptian rulers

difficult_points: that of Egyptian rulers 中 that 代替 experience，避免重复。
different from 强调古希腊与埃及对海盗的关系不同。
The ancient Greek world's experience 是所有格结构，核心名词是 experience。

sentences.sentence: While Egypt's power was land-based, the ancient Greeks relied on the Mediterranean in almost all aspects of life, from trade to warfare.
sentences.translation: 埃及的力量以陆地为基础，而古希腊人几乎在生活的所有方面都依赖地中海，从贸易到战争皆是如此。

structure.text: relied on the Mediterranean in almost all aspects of life

difficult_points: While 在这里强调对比，而不是单纯表示时间。
land-based 与 relied on the Mediterranean 形成陆地和海洋依赖的对照。
from trade to warfare 举例说明 almost all aspects of life 的范围。

sentences.sentence: Interestingly, in his works the Iliad and the Odyssey, the ancient Greek writer Homer not only condones, but praises the lifestyle and actions of pirates.
sentences.translation: 有趣的是，在他的作品《伊利亚特》和《奥德赛》中，古希腊作家荷马不仅宽恕，甚至赞美海盗的生活方式和行为。

structure.text: in his works the Iliad and the Odyssey
not only condones, but praises the lifestyle and actions of pirates

difficult_points: Interestingly 表示作者认为荷马态度值得注意。
in his works... 提供证据来源，即荷马作品。
not only... but... 构成递进，表示不只是容忍，还赞美。
condones 和 praises 共用宾语 the lifestyle and actions of pirates。

sentences.sentence: The opinion remained unchanged in the following centuries.
sentences.translation: 这种看法在随后的几个世纪中保持不变。
difficult_points: The opinion 指前一句所说的对海盗生活和行为的宽容甚至赞美态度。
remained unchanged 表示态度持续不变。
in the following centuries 强调这种观念延续了多个世纪。

sentences.sentence: The ancient Greek historian Thucydides, for instance, glorified pirates' daring attacks on ships or even cities.
sentences.translation: 例如，古希腊历史学家修昔底德就美化了海盗对船只甚至城市的大胆袭击。

structure.text: glorified pirates' daring attacks on ships or even cities

difficult_points: for instance 插入句中，表明修昔底德是延续这一态度的例子。
glorified 表示赞颂或美化，而不是中性记录。
on ships or even cities 说明袭击对象从船只扩大到城市，语气递进。

sentences.sentence: For Greeks, piracy was a part of everyday life.
sentences.translation: 对希腊人来说，海盗活动是日常生活的一部分。

structure.text: was a part of everyday life

difficult_points: For Greeks 表示从希腊人的视角看待海盗活动。
a part of everyday life 强调海盗活动并非边缘或罕见现象。
everyday life 指日常社会生活，而不只是战争。

sentences.sentence: Even high-ranking members of the state were not beyond engaging in such activities.
sentences.translation: 即便国家中的高级成员也并非不会参与这类活动。

structure.text: Even high-ranking members of the state
were not beyond engaging in such activities

difficult_points: Even 强调连高级国家成员也会参与，出乎普通预期。
not beyond doing 表示并非不屑于或不会做某事。
such activities 指前文的 piracy 或与海盗相关的行为。

expressions.meaning_zh: 并非不会做；并非不屑于做

sentences.sentence: According to the Greek orator Demosthenes, in 355 BCE, Athenian ambassadors made a detour from their official travel to capture a ship sailing from Egypt, taking the wealth found onboard for themselves!
sentences.translation: 据希腊演说家德摩斯梯尼记载，公元前355年，雅典使节在公务旅行途中绕路去劫获一艘从埃及驶来的船，并把船上发现的财富据为己有！

structure.text: According to the Greek orator Demosthenes
made a detour from their official travel
to capture a ship sailing from Egypt
taking the wealth found onboard for themselves

difficult_points: According to... 引出信息来源，说明这是 Demosthenes 的记载。
made a detour from their official travel 表示他们偏离官方行程。
to capture... 表目的，说明绕路是为了劫船。
taking... 是现在分词结果或伴随状语，说明劫船后的获利行为。

sentences.sentence: The Greeks' liberal approach towards piracy does not mean they always tolerated it, but attempts to curtail piracy were hampered by the large number of pirates operating in the Mediterranean.
sentences.translation: 希腊人对海盗活动的宽松态度并不意味着他们总是容忍它，但遏制海盗活动的尝试受到地中海大量活跃海盗的阻碍。

structure.text: The Greeks' liberal approach towards piracy
does not mean they always tolerated it
but attempts to curtail piracy were hampered
by the large number of pirates operating in the Mediterranean

difficult_points: does not mean 后省略 that，引出作者对宽松态度的限定。
it 指 piracy。
attempts to curtail piracy 是后半句主语，核心是 attempts。
were hampered by... 是被动语态，说明遏制尝试受阻于海盗数量太多。

sentences.sentence: The rising power of ancient Rome required the Roman Republic to deal with piracy in the Mediterranean.
sentences.translation: 古罗马力量的崛起要求罗马共和国处理地中海的海盗问题。

structure.text: The rising power of ancient Rome
required the Roman Republic to deal with piracy in the Mediterranean
to deal with piracy in the Mediterranean

difficult_points: The rising power of ancient Rome 是名词短语主语，核心是 power。
required ... to deal with 是 require + 宾语 + 不定式结构。
deal with piracy 表示处理或应对海盗问题。

sentences.sentence: While piracy was a serious issue for the Republic, Rome profited greatly from its existence.
sentences.translation: 虽然海盗活动是罗马共和国面临的严重问题，但罗马也从它的存在中获利颇丰。

structure.text: While piracy was a serious issue for the Republic

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，形成“问题”和“利益”的对比。
its existence 中 its 指 piracy。
profited greatly from 表示从海盗存在中获得巨大好处。

sentences.sentence: Pirate raids provided a steady source of slaves, essential for Rome's agriculture and mining industries.
sentences.translation: 海盗袭击为罗马提供了稳定的奴隶来源，而奴隶对罗马的农业和采矿业至关重要。

structure.text: provided a steady source of slaves
essential for Rome's agriculture and mining industries

difficult_points: provided a steady source of slaves 表示海盗袭击持续供应奴隶。
essential for... 是后置形容词短语，说明 slaves 对罗马产业的重要性。
agriculture and mining industries 是并列产业，都是奴隶劳动需求大的领域。

sentences.sentence: But this arrangement could work only while the pirates left Roman interests alone.
sentences.translation: 但这种安排只有在海盗不触碰罗马利益时才能维持。

structure.text: while the pirates left Roman interests alone

difficult_points: But 表示转折，指出罗马从海盗中获利有前提。
this arrangement 指罗马容忍海盗、从奴隶供应获利的安排。
left Roman interests alone 表示不侵犯罗马利益。

sentences.sentence: Pirate attacks on grain ships, which were essential to Roman citizens, led to angry voices in the Senate, demanding punishment of the culprits.
sentences.translation: 海盗对运粮船的袭击引发了元老院中的愤怒呼声，要求惩罚罪魁祸首，而这些运粮船对罗马公民至关重要。

structure.text: which were essential to Roman citizens
led to angry voices in the Senate

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，说明 grain ships 对罗马公民的重要性。
led to 表示海盗袭击导致政治反应。
angry voices in the Senate 指元老院中要求行动的愤怒意见。
demanding... 是现在分词短语，修饰 voices。

sentences.sentence: Rome, however, did nothing, further encouraging piracy.
sentences.translation: 然而，罗马什么也没做，这进一步助长了海盗活动。
difficult_points: however 插入主语和谓语之间，表示与元老院愤怒呼声相反的结果。
did nothing 强调罗马没有采取行动。
further encouraging piracy 是现在分词结果状语，说明不作为产生的后果。

sentences.sentence: By the 1st century BCE, emboldened pirates kidnapped prominent Roman dignitaries, asking for a large ransom to be paid.
sentences.translation: 到公元前1世纪，胆子变大的海盗绑架了显赫的罗马高官，并要求支付大笔赎金。

structure.text: asking for a large ransom to be paid

difficult_points: By the 1st century BCE 表示到这一历史阶段海盗问题升级。
emboldened pirates 指因罗马不作为而变得更大胆的海盗。
asking for... 是现在分词伴随状语，说明绑架后的要求。
to be paid 是被动不定式，修饰 ransom。

sentences.sentence: Their most famous hostage was none other than Julius Caesar, captured in 75 BCE.
sentences.translation: 他们最著名的人质正是尤利乌斯·凯撒，他于公元前75年被俘。

structure.text: was none other than Julius Caesar

difficult_points: Their 指前一句的 pirates。
none other than 用来强调此人身份非同一般。
captured in 75 BCE 是过去分词短语，补充说明凯撒被俘时间。

sentences.sentence: By now, Rome was well aware that pirates had outlived their usefulness.
sentences.translation: 到这时，罗马已经清楚意识到海盗已不再有利用价值。

structure.text: that pirates had outlived their usefulness

difficult_points: By now 指经过海盗袭击粮船和绑架高官之后的阶段。
was well aware that 表示充分意识到某事。
had outlived their usefulness 使用过去完成时，表示海盗的利用价值已经结束。

sentences.sentence: The time had come for concerted action.
sentences.translation: 采取协同行动的时机已经到来。
difficult_points: had come 使用过去完成时，表示到该历史节点时条件已经成熟。
concerted action 指有组织、协同的行动。
for concerted action 说明到来的不是普通时间，而是采取行动的时机。

sentences.sentence: In 67 BCE, a new law granted Pompey vast funds to combat the Mediterranean menace.
sentences.translation: 公元前67年，一项新法律授予庞培巨额资金，用以对抗地中海威胁。
difficult_points: granted Pompey vast funds 是授予双宾语结构，Pompey 是间接宾语。
to combat... 表目的，说明资金用途。
the Mediterranean menace 指海盗对地中海造成的威胁。

sentences.sentence: Taking personal command, Pompey divided the entire Mediterranean into 13 districts, assigning a fleet and commander to each.
sentences.translation: 庞培亲自指挥，将整个地中海划分为13个区，并给每个区分配一支舰队和一名指挥官。

structure.text: divided the entire Mediterranean into 13 districts
assigning a fleet and commander to each

difficult_points: Taking personal command 是现在分词短语，说明庞培亲自掌握指挥权。
divided ... into ... 表示把整体划分成若干部分。
assigning... 是现在分词伴随状语，说明划分区域后的具体部署。
each 指 13 districts 中的每一个区。

sentences.sentence: After cleansing one district of pirates, the fleet would join another in the next district.
sentences.translation: 在清除一个地区的海盗后，这支舰队会加入下一个地区的另一支舰队。

structure.text: After cleansing one district of pirates

difficult_points: After cleansing... 表示完成一个地区清剿后的下一步行动。
cleansing one district of pirates 中 of 表示从该地区清除海盗。
another 省略 fleet，指下一个地区的另一支舰队。
would join 表示计划中的连续行动模式。

sentences.sentence: The process continued until the entire Mediterranean was free of pirates.
sentences.translation: 这一过程持续进行，直到整个地中海都没有海盗为止。

structure.text: until the entire Mediterranean was free of pirates

difficult_points: The process 指上一句所述清剿一个区后再加入下一区的流程。
until 引导时间状语从句，说明流程持续到何时。
was free of pirates 表示没有海盗，而不是“海盗自由”。

sentences.sentence: Although thousands of pirates died at the hands of Pompey's troops, as a long-term solution to the problem, many more were offered land in fertile areas located far from the sea.
sentences.translation: 虽然成千上万的海盗死于庞培军队之手，但作为解决这一问题的长期方案，更多海盗被提供了远离海洋的肥沃地区的土地。

structure.text: Although thousands of pirates died at the hands of Pompey's troops
as a long-term solution to the problem
were offered land in fertile areas located far from the sea

difficult_points: Although 引导让步从句，说明清剿并非只有杀戮。
at the hands of 表示死于某人之手。
many more 指比死去海盗更多的人。
were offered land 是被动结构，体现安置海盗作为长期解决方案。

sentences.sentence: Instead of a maritime menace, Rome got productive farmers that further boosted its economy.
sentences.translation: 罗马得到的不再是海上威胁，而是能进一步促进其经济的生产性农民。
difficult_points: Instead of a maritime menace 表示海盗身份和社会功能的转变。
productive farmers 与 maritime menace 形成对照。
that 引导定语从句修饰 farmers。
its economy 中 its 指 Rome。
